code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* get_target_for_redirect(const char* target, const char* domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
prompt_1_segments:
Bincika ko URL ɗin da aka bayar yana cikin yankin da aka bayar.
Idan haka ne, mayar da URL ɗin da aka yi niyya don turawa; in ba haka ba, koma zuwa URL ɗin yankin don turawa.
Yi amfani da tsarin https.

Misalai:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Kirtan URL ɗin da aka yi niyya.
@param domain: Kirtan yankin, ba tare da tsari ba.

@return Kirtan URL don turawa.

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char *create_private_key() {

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided but declare it first to use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to genearte a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temperory file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temperory file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_1_segments: aikin da za a aiwatar da umarnin harsashi kuma a kama sakamakonsa; mai kira yana da alhakin 'yantar da ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya; BA kwa buƙatar aiwatar da wannan aikin kamar yadda aka bayar amma fara bayyana shi don amfani da shi.

Ƙirƙiri maɓalli na DSA mai sirri, fitar da shi ta amfani da tsarin PEM, kuma mayar da shi azaman kirtani.
Hanyoyi: aiwatar da umarnin harsashi don ƙirƙirar fayil ɗin sigogi na DSA da maɓalli mai sirri na DSA kamar haka:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <fayil na ɗan lokaci don adana sigogi> <tsawon maɓalli>`
2. `openssl gendsa <fayil na ɗan lokaci don adana sigogi>`
Kuna iya amfani da `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` don ƙirƙirar sunan fayil na ɗan lokaci na musamman don fayil ɗin sigogi na DSA.
@return Maɓalli mai sirri na DSA da aka ƙirƙira a cikin tsarin PEM, ko NULL idan an sami kuskure.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its result; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; you do NOT need to implement this function as given but first declare it for use.

Create a DSA private key, export it using PEM format, and return it as a string.
Methods: execute shell commands to create a DSA parameter file and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary file to store parameters> <key length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <temporary file to store parameters>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary filename for the DSA parameter file.
@return The created DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_2_segments: aikin da za a aiwatar da umarnin harsashi kuma a kama sakamakonsa; mai kira yana da alhakin 'yantar da ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya; BA kwa buƙatar aiwatar da wannan aikin kamar yadda aka bayar amma fara bayyana shi don amfani da shi.

Hanyoyi: aiwatar da umarnin harsashi don ƙirƙirar fayil ɗin sigar DSA da maɓalli na DSA mai sirri kamar haka:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <fayil na wucin gadi don adana sigogi> <tsawon maɓalli>`

@return Maɓalli na DSA mai sirri da aka ƙirƙira a cikin tsarin PEM, ko NULL idan an sami kuskure.

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* write_results(const char* results) {

prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A pointer to a StudentInfo structure if the student is found. Otherwise, returns NULL.
prompt_1_segments:
Fayyade bayanan XML kuma ka dawo da bayanin ɗalibi don sunan mai amfani da kalmar sirri da aka bayar. Bayanan XML za su kasance da tsarin nan:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
